use_cases: Displaying stacked product cards that animate in on scroll for e-commerce landing pages
Showcasing food menu items with emoji icons and colorful gradient backgrounds
Creating engaging testimonial or review card stacks with spring animations
Building portfolio showcases with scroll-triggered card reveals
Designing feature highlight sections with stacked animated cards
ai_summary: A scroll-triggered card stack component that displays multiple cards animating into view using Motion React. Cards feature colorful linear gradient backgrounds with custom clip-path splash shapes and spring physics animations that move cards upward while applying rotation. The component uses viewport detection to trigger animations, making it ideal for creating engaging scroll-based reveal effects on landing pages, product showcases, or feature displays.
